hints.text: All coverage = **white pickup truck** (fully visible or mostly blurred); plate mostly white w/ small blue hint left
**Kazakh** in Cyrillic (extra letters **Ә Ғ Қ Ң Ө Ұ Ү Һ І**) + some Latin; sometimes monolingual Russian
Infrastructure very **Russia-like** (poles, signs, houses); tree-trunk bottoms often painted white
Pedestrian crossings yellow+white stripes **with white dashes on either side** (Russia lacks the dashes)
Post-Soviet + Turkish-style bollards; **two thin bollards joined at 90°** are unique to Kazakhstan
**Gas pipes everywhere** in cities; chevrons **yellow-and-black** (T-junctions = red/white)
**Koshkar-muiz** ornamental pattern in decorations; ornate town **entrance arcs**
Coverage limited; **season ≈ region**: summer = W/central, autumn = NE, winter = SE
**Area codes east→west** along 3 horizontal bands; plate region codes run alphabetically
Generally **flat** steppe; hills → Karaganda/Aktobe; big snow-capped mountains → south & east
Lush **birch forests + green fields** → north (like Omsk); vast grassy plains → NW (Akmola/Kostanay)
Sandy shrubby **desert** → SW; tall snow-capped **mountains** → SE (east of Almaty)
**Pole paints** identify the city (Kostanay turquoise+yellow, Taraz red/yellow/black…); city bus colours (Almaty green, Karaganda turquoise)
